title: Eshkere-modpack
description: My client modpack for best vanilla minecraft experience
body:
# My own modpack for smp servers play

---

## 📦 Modpack description

This modpack is designed for comfortable play on **SMP servers**, combining the most necessary **technical**, **optimization** and **engineering** mods. Its main goal is to provide stable gameplay without unnecessary load, while maintaining a pure vanilla style, but supplementing it with useful technical features.

### 🚀 Optimization

The modpack contains a set of mods that improve performance, speed up world loading and reduce lag in both singleplayer and servers. FPS is stable even in large bases and dense biomes.

### 🛠️ Technical features

Technical mods add convenient tools, automation and engineering features that make the game more efficient and well-thought-out. They do not change the basic essence of the game, but open access to advanced technical mechanics.

### 🎮 Perfect for SMP

A balanced selection of mods makes this modpack a great choice for playing with friends or on any SMP server. A minimum of unnecessary things - a maximum of stability, compatibility and comfort.
